name: Creamy Brussels Sprouts and Noodles
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked and drained egg noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the Brussels sprouts in a saucepan with a small amount of water; cover and cook until tender.
2. In a skillet, sauté onions in 2 tablespoons butter until golden brown. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in sour cream, cottage cheese, garlic, paprika, salt, and caraway seeds into the sautéed onions.
4. Drain the Brussels sprouts; add them to the onion mixture along with the cooked noodles.
5. Transfer the mixture into a greased shallow 2-quart baking dish.
6. Melt the remaining butter and toss it with bread crumbs. Sprinkle over the casserole.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 375 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
